Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor without feat/fix
- [ ] `test` — Adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance / dependencies
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `AGENTS.md` before making changes
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for any logic change in `packages/core/`
- [ ] All tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] I did **NOT** import browser APIs or React inside `packages/core/`
- [ ] The public API `convert(md: string): string` is unchanged (or includes `BREAKING CHANGE` in commit)
